ID="MaHopDong"><AggregateFunction>Count</AggregateFunction><Caption>Mã hợp đồng</Caption><DataMember>MaHopDong</DataMember><Key>MaHopDong</Key><Position>2</Position><Width>144</Width></Column2><Column3 ID="HoTen"><Caption>Họ và ID="SoCMT"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Số CMT</Caption><DataMember>SoCMT</DataMember><Key>SoCMT</Key><Position>5</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>150</Width></Column5><Column6 ID="Ten_Thon"><Caption>Thôn</Caption><DataMember>Ten_Thon</DataMember><HideWhenGrouped>True</HideWhenGrouped><Key>Ten_Thon</Key><Position>6</Position><Visible>False</Visible><Width>75</Width></Column6><Column7 ID="NgayCap"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Ngày cấp</Caption><DataMember>NgayCap</DataMember><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><Key>NgayCap</Key><Position>8</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>120</Width></Column8><Column9 ID="NoiCap"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Nơi cấp</Caption><DataMember>NoiCap</DataMember><Key>NoiCap</Key><Position>9</Position><Visible>False</Visible><Width>150</Width></Column9><Column10 ID="SoLuong"><Caption>Số Lượng</Caption><DataMember>SoLuong</DataMember><FormatString># ### ### ###</FormatString><Key>SoLuong</Key><Position>10</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Visible>False</Visible><Width>43</Width></Column10><Column11 ID="DienTich"><Caption>Diện tích</Caption><DataMember>DienTich</DataMember><DefaultGroupFormatString># ### ### ###</DefaultGroupFormatString><Key>DienTich</Key><Position>11</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Visible>False</Visible></Column11><Column12 ID="NgayKyHopDong"><Caption>Ngày ký hợp /><RowHeight>25</RowHeight><TotalRow>True</TotalRow></RootTable><RowWithErrorsFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>RowWithErrorsFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></RowWithErrorsFormatStyle><LinkFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>LinkFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></LinkFormatStyle><CardCaptionFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>CardCaptionFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></CardCaptionFormatStyle><GroupByBoxFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>GroupByBoxFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></GroupByBoxFormatStyle><GroupByBoxInfoFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>GroupByBoxInfoFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></GroupByBoxInfoFormatStyle><GroupRowFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>GroupRowFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></GroupRowFormatStyle><HeaderFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>HeaderFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></HeaderFormatStyle><PreviewRowFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>PreviewRowFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></PreviewRowFormatStyle><RowFormatStyle><BackColorAlphaMode>Opaque</BackColorAlphaMode><PredefinedStyle>RowFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></RowFormatStyle><SelectedFormatStyle><BackColor>GradientInactiveCaption</BackColor><ForeColor>Black</ForeColor><FontBold>True</FontBold><PredefinedStyle>SelectedFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></SelectedFormatStyle><SelectedInactiveFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>SelectedInactiveFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></SelectedInactiveFormatStyle><WatermarkImage 9pt</Font><ScrollBarWidth>17</ScrollBarWidth><VisualStyle>Standard</VisualStyle><ShowErrors>False</ShowErrors><AllowEdit>False</AllowEdit><AutomaticSort>False</AutomaticSort><ColumnAutoResize>True</ColumnAutoResize><GroupByBoxVisible>False</GroupByBoxVisible><HideSelection>Highlight</HideSelection><RepeatHeaders>False</RepeatHeaders><TotalRow>True</TotalRow><EnterKeyBehavior>NextCell</EnterKeyBehavior><BuiltInTexts ID="ID"><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><Key>ID</Key><Position>0</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column0><Column1 ID="DanhMucHoTroID"><CompareTarget>Text</CompareTarget><Caption>Loại hình hỗ trợ</Caption><DataMember>DanhMucHoTroID</DataMember><DefaultGroupInterval>Text</DefaultGroupInterval><EditType>MultiColumnCombo</EditType><Key>DanhMucHoTroID</Key><Position>1</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><Visible>False</Visible><Width>386</Width><DropDownIndex>0</DropDownIndex></Column1><Column2 ID="NgayLamHoTro"><Caption>Ngày làm hỗ trợ</Caption><DataMember>NgayLamHoTro</DataMember><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><Key>NgayLamHoTro</Key><Position>2</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>119</Width></Column2><Column3 ID="DonGia"><Caption>Đơn giá (đồng)</Caption><DataMember>DonGia</DataMember><FormatString># ### ### ##0</FormatString><Key>DonGia</Key><Position>3</Position><Selectable>False</Selectable><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>99</Width></Column3><Column4 ID="GhiChu"><Caption>Ghi chú</Caption><DataMember>GhiChu</DataMember><Key>GhiChu</Key><Position>4</Position><Width>583</Width></Column4><Column5 ID="XemHoTro"><ButtonDisplayMode>Always</ButtonDisplayMode><AllowDrag>False</AllowDrag><AllowRemove>False</AllowRemove><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><AllowSort>False</AllowSort><ButtonText>...</ButtonText><ButtonToolTipText>Xem chi tiết hỗ trợ /><RowHeight>25</RowHeight><TotalRow>False</TotalRow></RootTable><DropDowns Collection="true" ElementName="DropDown"><DropDown0 ID="ddl_DanhMucHoTro"><RootTable><Columns Collection="true"
